hero.title: Elden Ring Automatic Checklist
hero.lede: Ascend to your throne with absolute clarity. Upload your {file} to instantly cross-reference your progress against the vast treasures of the Lands Between.

upload.disclaimer: Local analysis · No data leaves your machine

wisdom.title: The Archive's Wisdom
wisdom.body: Every item in your inventory is a fragment of history. The Archive doesn't just track your items; it maps your legend across the fog-shrouded history of the Lands Between. Ensure no stone remains unturned, and no boss remains unchallenged.
wisdom.caption: Restored Archives
